allow: Bash(python research.py search "transformer attention mechanism" --sources arxiv --max 3)
Bash(python research.py search "large language model reasoning" --max 6)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k: d[k] for k in ['paper_id','title','page_count','sections']}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python research.py search "chain of thought reasoning LLM" --max 4)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(f\\"  [{p['source']}] {p['title'][:70]} \({p['year']}\) citations={p['citation_count']}\\"\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=sys.stdin.read\(\); lines=data.strip\(\).split\('\\n'\); warnings=[l for l in lines if l.startswith\('['\)]; json_start=next\(i for i,l in enumerate\(lines\) if l.strip\(\).startswith\('[{'\)\); papers=json.loads\('\\n'.join\(lines[json_start:]\)\); [print\(f\\"  [{p['source']}] {p['title'][:70]} \({p['year']}\) citations={p['citation_count']}\\"\) for p in papers]; [print\('  WARN:',w\) for w in warnings]")
Bash(python -c "import json; [print\(p['source'], p['title'][:60]\) for p in json.load\(open\('out.json'\)\)]")
Bash(python research.py search "chain of thought reasoning LLM" --max 6)
Bash(python -c "import json; [print\(f\\"  [{p['source']:14}] {p['title'][:65]} \({p['year']}\) citations={p['citation_count']}\\"\) for p in json.load\(open\('out.json'\)\)]")
Bash(python research.py search "chain of thought reasoning LLM" --sources google_scholar --max 4)
Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('out.json'\)\); [print\(f\\"  [{p['source']}] {p['title'][:65]} \({p['year']}\) citations={p['citation_count']}\\"\) for p in data]")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('out.json'\)\); print\(f\\"  title: {d['title']}\\n  sections: {list\(d['sections'].keys\(\)\)[:4]}\\n  text_len: {len\(d['text']\)} chars\\"\)")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('out.json'\)\); print\(f\\"  title: {d['title']}\\n  pages: {d['page_count']}\\n  text_len: {len\(d['text']\)} chars\\"\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; papers=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'  {len\(papers\)} papers saved'\); [print\(f\\"  [{p['source']}] {p['title'][:55]}\\"\) for p in papers]")
